name: 5q11_2_KIT_FBN2_paralog
description: 5q11.2 region containing the KIT receptor tyrosine kinase and FBN2 (fibrillin-2). KIT is paralogous to PDGFRA (4q12), CSF1R (5q32) and FLT3 (13q12) at the kinase-domain level; FBN2 shares >65% protein identity with FBN1 (15q21) and FBN3 (19p13). Short intragenic SDs in FBN2 produce paralog tracts complicating read mapping.

architecture.internal_structure: Short intragenic SDs in FBN2 (cb-EGF tandem repeats) at >95% identity; KIT kinase domain shares 60-80% protein identity with PDGFRA, CSF1R, FLT3; no large local CNV.
